glossary.title: Stats Glossary
glossary.subtitle: What does each stat mean?
glossary.description: All statistics sourced from Fantasy Premier League (FPL) — 2025/26 season.

Pts.name: Total Points
Pts.desc: Total FPL points earned this season. Accumulated from goals, assists, clean sheets, bonus, and minutes played.

Min.name: Minutes
Min.desc: Total minutes played across all Premier League appearances this season.

St.name: Starts
St.desc: Number of matches the player started in the first XI.

G.name: Goals
G.desc: Total goals scored in the Premier League this season.

A.name: Assists
A.desc: Total assists — the final pass or cross leading directly to a goal.

xG.name: Expected Goals
xG.desc: Statistical measure of the quality of chances. An xG of 0.5 means a 50% probability of scoring from that position.

xA.name: Expected Assists
xA.desc: Statistical measure of the quality of chances created for teammates.

CS.name: Clean Sheets
CS.desc: Matches where the team conceded zero goals while the player was on the pitch for 60+ minutes.

Bon.name: Bonus Points
Bon.desc: Extra FPL points awarded to the top 3 performers in each match based on the Bonus Points System (BPS).

Form.name: Form
Form.desc: Average FPL points per match over the last 30 days. A higher number indicates stronger recent performance.

PPG.name: Points per Game
PPG.desc: Average FPL points earned per match across the entire season.

xP.name: Expected Points Next
xP.desc: FPL's predicted points for the next gameweek, factoring in fixture difficulty, form, and historical data.

Price.name: Price
Price.desc: Current FPL price in millions. Price rises when many managers transfer a player in, and falls when transferred out.

DT.name: Dream Team
DT.desc: Number of times the player appeared in the FPL Gameweek Dream Team — the best XI of each week.

stats.noStats: Statistics not available. API key may not be configured.

metadata.title: The Club
metadata.description: Liverpool FC — 20 league titles, 6 European Cups. Explore the history, stadium, legends, traditions and more.

hero.foundingStory: Liverpool FC was born from a bitter dispute. In 1892, Everton FC left Anfield over a rent disagreement with their landlord John Houlding. Left with a stadium but no team, Houlding founded Liverpool Football Club on 15 March 1892. The club was admitted to the Football League the following year and won their first league title in 1901. What began as one man's determination to fill an empty stadium has grown into one of the most successful and beloved football clubs in the world.

metadata.title: About | LFCVN
metadata.description: Learn more about LFCVN — features, tech stack, and the creator behind this Liverpool FC community project.

About.label: About
About.title: The Story Behind
About.disclaimer: LFCVN is an <status>unofficial & independent</status> project. Not endorsed by or affiliated with Liverpool Football Club, Fenway Sports Group, or the Premier League. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.

whatIs.title: What is this site?
whatIs.description: LFCVN is an all-in-one Liverpool FC platform that brings together real-time football data, multilingual news, and rich club history — designed for Reds worldwide.

features.squad: Full squad with FPL stats — form, price, xG/xA, selection %, injury updates
features.season: Season dashboard with fixtures, PL & UCL standings, top scorers & assists charts
features.fixtures: Match timeline across 4 competitions — Premier League, Champions League, FA Cup, EFL Cup
features.news: News from 10+ sources in English & Vietnamese with smart categorisation and in-app reading
features.history: Club heritage — Anfield stadium, trophy cabinet, historical timeline, legends & managers
features.profile: Personal account with avatar, favourite players, and saved preferences
features.ai: LiverBird AI — ask about match results, player stats, transfer rumours, club history & more
features.i18n: Full bilingual support — English & Vietnamese with automatic locale detection

whatIs.dataSources: Fantasy Premier League API · Football-Data.org · ESPN · RSS feeds from BBC, Guardian, This Is Anfield, Liverpool Echo, Sky Sports, Anfield Watch, and Vietnamese outlets (Bóng Đá, 24h). Content enriched with Mozilla Readability.
whatIs.techStack: Next.js 16 (App Router, ISR) · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS 4 · shadcn/ui · Framer Motion · Recharts · Supabase (Auth + PostgreSQL + Storage) · next-intl (EN/VI)

creator.title: Creator
creator.bio: A software engineer by trade, a Liverpool fan by heart. Built LFCVN as a passion project and decided to share it with the global LFC community.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a feature request, found a bug, need support, or want to collaborate? Feel free to reach out — all feedback is welcome.

support.title: Support This Project
support.description: Free forever. A small contribution helps cover API and hosting costs.

metadata.title: Legal
metadata.description: Legal information, privacy policy, and terms of use.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: LFCVN is an independent project and is not affiliated with Liverpool Football Club or Fenway Sports Group. We do not collect personal data beyond what is necessary for account functionality (email, username, avatar). Authentication is handled securely via Supabase. We do not sell or share your data with third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.content: This site is provided as-is for informational and entertainment purposes only. All Liverpool FC trademarks, logos, and brand elements are the property of Liverpool Football Club and Athletic Grounds Limited. Match data is sourced from the Fantasy Premier League API and Football-Data.org. News content is aggregated from BBC Sport RSS feeds. Use of this site constitutes acceptance of these terms.

sources.title: Data Sources
sources.content: Match data, fixtures, and player statistics are provided by the Fantasy Premier League API (fantasy.premierleague.com). League standings are provided by Football-Data.org. News articles are aggregated from BBC Sport RSS feeds. Historical data and trophy information are maintained by the site administrators based on publicly available records.
